mode_contract.static: social client may become unavailable and must not simulate shared mutation
mode_contract.blob: basic account, post, reply, follow, like, discover, and following feed
mode_contract.postgres: relational profiles, communities, moderation, appeals, viewer controls, event history, and idempotent mutations

highest_priority_gaps: no visible profile view or profile editing journey
no visible community creation, membership, role, or fork journey
no visible thread route beyond inline replies
no visible report, moderation, appeal, or appeal-decision journey
no visible viewer-local mute or block controls
no visible author edit or delete control despite server authority
release_rule: A capability is not a product feature until the consumer can reach it and its unavailable mode is explicit.
